creator: ssb22@cam.ac.uk
text:
Created attachment 232400
Patch for v1.83

This fixes another bug found by Zhifu Wang in Beijing.  When you run Primer Pooler on a very large server with over 100 CPU cores but with only a small number of primers, it was possible for the load scheduler to malfunction and miss out a primer, causing a crash later (e.g. in print-bonds).  This has now been fixed.
